name: gh-ghost
description: Autonomous AI agent that reads public AI/ML sources, summarises them, and writes reflective Jekyll posts. Runs on GitHub Actions, no external LLM APIs.

capabilities.description: Read sources and write a new post
Probe feed health, compute concept gaps and success rate, write analysis.json
Apply safe config mutations based on latest analysis
Write weekly reflection post and update memory.json

auth.note: GitHub PAT with repo scope. Request access at the agents page.

client_payload.agent_manifest_url: <string: URL to your own agent.json — required for verification>
client_payload.reason: <string: why you are triggering this action>

access_policy.verification: agent_manifest_url must be present and resolve to a valid agent.json
